findings.evidence: Changed line 54 applies `IsOpenMap.of_comp`, whose Mathlib type is `theorem of_comp ... (h : IsOpenMap (g ∘ f)) : IsOpenMap g`; `orbitQuotientToBase_mk` at `TauCeti/.../Deck/Quotient.lean:57` is `rfl`, so the current proof closes only by unfolding that wrapper.
findings.fix: Make the composite identification explicit, e.g. pass `by simpa [Function.comp_def] using hp`, or factor a small lemma for `orbitQuotientToBase p ∘ Quotient.mk'' = p` and use it here.
findings.issue: `IsOpenMap.of_comp ... hp` relies silently on Lean reducing `orbitQuotientToBase p ∘ Quotient.mk''` to `p` through `Quotient.lift`/`Quotient.mk''`.

summary: The proof is shorter but now depends on an implicit definitional-equality unification between the quotient-induced composite and `p`, which is fragile and obscures why `of_comp` applies.
